recommendations.title: Wish Upon a Star
recommendations.overview: A younger sister wishes to switch places with her popular older sister and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Richie Rich's Christmas Wish
recommendations.overview: After getting blamed for spoiling Christmas, the richest kid in the world wishes he'd never been born. Unfortunately, a wishing machine, invented by professor Keenbean, picked up the wish and made it come true. Now Richie finds himself in a parallel

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.overview: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luig

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: School of Life

recommendations.title: The Maker
recommendations.overview: A strange creature races against time to make the most important and beautiful creation of his life.

recommendations.title: The Care Bears Movie
recommendations.overview: The Care Bears team up with a troubled brother and sister who just moved to a new town to help a neglected young magician's apprentice whose evil spell book causes sinister things to happen.
